## Module PR — [module-slug]

### Module type
- [ ] skill
- [ ] prompt
- [ ] app/streamlit
- [ ] app/web
- [ ] google-script
- [ ] template

### Summary
What does this module do? (1–2 sentences)

### Problem it solves

### Checklist
- [ ] README.md complete (all required sections present)
- [ ] metadata.yaml complete and valid
- [ ] examples/ folder has at least one real input/output pair
- [ ] Module tested with real input
- [ ] No existing module covers the same use case
- [ ] Proposal issue was approved before this PR

**If app/streamlit:**
- [ ] Standard API key check block at top of app.py
- [ ] requirements.txt included
- [ ] .env.example included (if API keys needed)

**If google-script:**
- [ ] setup-instructions.md included

**Security check:**
- [ ] No real API keys in any committed file

### Link to approved proposal issue
Closes #[issue number]

### Notes for reviewer
